subcodes.first_line: O luminous and spiritual friends! Jinab-i-Murtada hath made mention of you in his letter and of those who yearn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران نورانی روحانی جناب مرتضی در نامه خویش ذکر شما نموده و مشتاقان را
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @power of prayer, @call to action
